name: LiteMonitor
desc: 一款轻量级、高度可定制的 Windows桌面和任务栏硬件性能监控工具，支持监测 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网速、FPS 计数、插件扩展及内存清理。A lightweight, customizable hardware monitor for the Windows desktop & taskbar. Featu…
descFull: 一款轻量级、高度可定制的 Windows桌面和任务栏硬件性能监控工具，支持监测 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网速、FPS 计数、插件扩展及内存清理。A lightweight, customizable hardware monitor for the Windows desktop & taskbar. Features CPU/GPU/RAM/Network monitoring, FPS counter, plugin support, and memory optimization.
